Title: Xoa product co order history co the gay loi constraint
Steps To Reproduce: Dang nhap admin; mo product da tung mua; bam xoa
Expected Result: He thong tu choi delete bang thong diep nghiep vu
Actual Result: Truoc audit co nguy co loi foreign key 500; hien da tra 409 conflict
Recommendation: Giu rule 409 va huong admin chuyen product sang INACTIVE

Title: Product INACTIVE lo tren public catalog
Steps To Reproduce: Admin tao hoac chuyen product sang INACTIVE; mo public product list
Actual Result: Truoc audit public API co the tra inactive; hien da loc ACTIVE
Recommendation: Duy tri GET /api/admin/products cho admin thay day du

Title: Form review van hien sau khi gui thanh cong
Steps To Reproduce: User co order completed; gui review; quan sat Orders page
Expected Result: Item da review khong con form lap lai
Actual Result: Truoc audit form van con; hien orders mine tra reviewed va UI an form
Recommendation: Neu mo rong UI nen hien badge Da danh gia

Title: Khong co confirm truoc delete
Expected Result: Co confirm thao tac pha huy
Actual Result: Truoc audit request gui ngay; hien co window.confirm
Recommendation: Neu can UI dep hon thay confirm bang modal

Title: Thong diep voucher loi tren UI chua phan loai theo nguyen nhan
Steps To Reproduce: Nhap voucher het han va voucher khong du min order tren Checkout page
Expected Result: UI co the hien loi cu the va gan voi field voucher
Actual Result: Backend tra message dung nhung UI gom chung thanh form error
Recommendation: Tach khu vuc thong bao voucher va giu message backend gan input voucher

Title: Bang voucher chua co filter active expired
Steps To Reproduce: Dang nhap admin; mo Voucher page; quan sat danh sach voucher
Expected Result: Admin de xem active inactive expired rieng
Actual Result: Trang hien tat ca voucher mot bang duy nhat
Recommendation: Them filter status va expired tren frontend neu can mo rong demo
